form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 5th (Fr3) over 1660m after showing early speed at Victor Harbor, beaten 15 m by Nanna Helen (2:02.30) in NR up to 40 on December 29 at $3. Will be better for the run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted into the sprint lane in the final straight.
Galloped on two occasions in running.
Galloped out. Broke gait racing out of the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Imperial Monarch at Geelong over 2570m in a No NR on March 13 at $2.80. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after a quick start, behind Lovemeto at Melton over 2240m in a No NR on April 4 at $16. Brings good form from Victoria and can measure up.

form.formComment: Last start a big 9 m win (10m Fr4) at this track (2:52.10) beating Speedy Lover in No NR on March 27 at $13 at the bell was leading 3.88. In fine form and looks a player again.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth behind Keayang Zahara at this track over 1609m in a G1 No NR on March 14 at $26. Performed better the start before where he won by a head as favourite (Fr7) at this track (2:45.90) beating Speedy Lover in No NR on March 7 at $1.65 at the bell was 5th-11.09. Well placed dropping form Group 1 level.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 35 m by Keayang Zahara (1:51.50) in G1 No NR on March 14 at $151. Before that, 4th (Fr6) over 2300m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 21 m by Watts Up Partytime (2:45.90) in No NR on March 7 at $5. Can do much better.
